announcements.title: ACE CAREERS | TALENT HUB
announcements.message: ACE CAREERS: Connecting talent with opportunity. We guide qualified professionals from campus to career through dedicated career streams in engineering, technology, and management.

jobs.title: Marketing Executive (MBA Marketing)
jobs.location: Plan and execute marketing campaigns and support customer acquisition initiatives.

jobs.title: Business Development Executive (MBA Marketing)
jobs.location: Identify new business opportunities and build client relationships.

jobs.title: Financial Analyst (MBA Finance)
jobs.location: Analyze financial data and prepare reports to support business decisions.

jobs.title: Relationship Manager (MBA Finance)
jobs.location: Manage banking clients and promote financial products.

jobs.title: HR Generalist (MBA HR)
jobs.location: Manage recruitment, employee records, and HR operations.

jobs.title: International Sales Executive (MBA IB)
jobs.location: Manage overseas clients and support export sales activities.

jobs.title: Business Analyst (MBA Systems)
jobs.location: Analyze business processes and translate requirements into solutions.

jobs.title: Management Trainee (BBA)
jobs.location: Support business operations and learn management functions.

jobs.title: Data Analyst (BSc AI)
jobs.location: Analyze datasets to generate insights for decision making.

jobs.title: IT Helpdesk Technician (BSc Computer Applications)
jobs.location: Provide technical support and troubleshoot IT issues.

jobs.title: MIS Executive (BCom Computer Applications)
jobs.location: Prepare management reports and maintain business data systems.

jobs.title: Accounts Executive (BCom Finance)
jobs.location: Maintain accounting records and process financial transactions.

jobs.title: Tax Consultant (MCom)
jobs.location: Prepare tax filings and support tax compliance processes.

jobs.title: Systems Administrator (BTech IT)
jobs.location: Manage servers, networks, and IT infrastructure.

jobs.title: Software Developer (BTech CSE)
jobs.location: Develop and maintain software applications and systems.

jobs.title: Software QA Tester (BTech CSE)
jobs.location: Test software applications and ensure product quality.

jobs.title: Site Engineer (BTech Civil)
jobs.location: Supervise construction activities and site operations.

jobs.title: Electrical Design Engineer (BTech Electrical)
jobs.location: Design electrical systems and prepare technical drawings.

jobs.title: Embedded Systems Engineer (BTech ECE)
jobs.location: Develop embedded hardware and software systems.

jobs.title: Production Engineer (BTech Mechanical)
jobs.location: Plan and manage manufacturing production processes.
